section_title: Using as true a certificate known to be false.
chapter_title: Of False Evidence And Offences Against Public Justice
text:
Whoever corruptly uses or attempts to use any such certificate as a true certificate, knowing the same to be false in any material point, shall be punished in the same manner as if he gave false evidence. 
 BNSS Classification 
 The same as for giving false evidence. 
 Non-cognizable 
 Bailable 
 Triable by Court by which offence of giving false evidence is triable.
